g.text: IMPORTANT: 100nF ceramic cap between GPIO 34 and GND

g.desc: IMPORTANT: 100nF ceramic cap between GPIO 34 and GND

g.text: ESP32 powered via USB (separate from motor battery)

g.desc: ESP32 powered via USB (separate from motor battery)

g.text: LT = Forward, RT = Reverse, Left Stick = Steer, Y = Headlights

g.desc: LT = Forward, RT = Reverse, Left Stick = Steer, Y = Headlights

g.text: AO2 (pin 5) ---> Drive Motor Wire 2 (Swap if direction wrong)

g.desc: AO2 (pin 5) ---> Drive Motor Wire 2 (Swap if direction wrong)

g.text: AO1 (pin 4) ---> Drive Motor Wire 1 (Front+Rear DC parallel)

g.desc: AO1 (pin 4) ---> Drive Motor Wire 1 (Front+Rear DC parallel)

g.text: GPIO 14 ---> BIN2 (pin 11) Steering Motor Dir B

g.desc: GPIO 14 ---> BIN2 (pin 11) Steering Motor Dir B

g.text: GPIO 27 ---> BIN1 (pin 12) Steering Motor Dir A

g.desc: GPIO 27 ---> BIN1 (pin 12) Steering Motor Dir A

g.text: GND ---> TB6612 GND, Pot GND (Brown wire), Cap

g.desc: GND ---> TB6612 GND, Pot GND (Brown wire), Cap

g.text: GPIO 33 ---> AIN2 (pin 15) Drive Motor Dir B

g.desc: GPIO 33 ---> AIN2 (pin 15) Drive Motor Dir B

g.text: GPIO 25 ---> AIN1 (pin 14) Drive Motor Dir A

g.desc: GPIO 25 ---> AIN1 (pin 14) Drive Motor Dir A
